name: Webshare
description: Webshare Proxy API v2 for subscriptions, plans, residential/static proxy configuration and lists, usage statistics, source-IP authorization, and reseller sub-users. For residential proxies, use mode=backbone when listing or downloading endpoints.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key
credential_fields.description: Webshare API key from the dashboard. The Authorization scheme is Token, not Bearer.

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Get the account's subscription, active plan ID, dates, renewal state, credits, and throttling state.

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List active and historical Webshare plans. Use the active plan ID for plan-specific proxy and sub-user calls.

tools.name: get_plan
tools.description: Get one plan's proxy type, subtype, countries, bandwidth, refreshes, replacements, sub-user allowance, and concurrency features.

tools.name: get_available_assets
tools.description: Get currently available countries and subnet capacity for shared, semi-dedicated, dedicated, residential, ISP, and datacenter categories.

tools.name: get_proxy_config
tools.description: Get configuration for a plan, including timeouts, IP authorization settings, replacement behavior, and proxy-list download token.

tools.name: get_proxy_status
tools.description: Get asynchronous proxy-list state, allocated countries, generated credentials, and whether the plan's proxies have been used.

tools.name: get_proxy_stats
tools.description: Get plan allocation capacity, IP ranges, available ranges, and ASN inventory before changing proxy allocation.

tools.name: list_proxies
tools.description: List allocated proxy endpoints with pagination and filters. Set mode=backbone for rotating residential proxies; direct mode lists static allocated proxies.

mode.description: Required. Use backbone for residential proxies.

tools.name: download_proxy_list
tools.description: Download proxy endpoints as text. Use mode=backbone for residential plans and choose a format containing the credentials/host fields needed by the client.

proxy_format.description: Webshare proxy format template, for example username:password@proxy_address:port.

tools.name: refresh_proxy_list
tools.description: Trigger an on-demand proxy-list refresh. This consumes one refresh allowance and replaces endpoints, so inspect the active plan before calling.

tools.name: list_usage_stats
tools.description: Get hourly aggregate bandwidth, request outcomes, error reasons, countries, protocols, and concurrency. History is limited to 90 days.

timestamp__gte.description: ISO-8601 start timestamp, no older than 90 days.

timestamp__lte.description: ISO-8601 end timestamp, no later than subscription end.

tools.name: aggregate_usage_stats
tools.description: Get totals for bandwidth, requests, failures, countries, protocols, concurrency, and error reasons across a period of up to 90 days.

tools.name: get_public_ip
tools.description: Return the caller's public IP, useful before creating an IP authorization.

tools.name: list_ip_authorizations
tools.description: List source IP addresses authorized to use Webshare proxies.

tools.name: get_ip_authorization
tools.description: Get one source-IP authorization by ID.

tools.name: create_ip_authorization
tools.description: Authorize a source IP for proxy access. Duplicate addresses return a validation error.

tools.name: delete_ip_authorization
tools.description: Remove a source IP authorization. Clients relying on it will lose proxy access.

tools.name: list_sub_users
tools.description: List reseller sub-users for the default or selected plan.

tools.name: get_sub_user
tools.description: Get one reseller sub-user and its limits.

tools.name: create_sub_user
tools.description: Create a reseller sub-user with proxy and concurrency limits. Requires sub-user capacity on the selected plan.

tools.name: update_sub_user
tools.description: Partially update a reseller sub-user's label or limits.

tools.name: refresh_sub_user_proxy_list
tools.description: Refresh a sub-user's custom proxy list. This changes their endpoints and may consume a refresh allowance.

tools.name: delete_sub_user
tools.description: Delete a reseller sub-user and invalidate its access.
